briefs.title: BC Disability Assistance Base Amount Rises to $1,950 Starting January 2026
briefs.summary: BC is raising the base amount (the core monthly support payment) for people on disability assistance from $1,620 to $1,950, effective January 1, 2026. Support rate tables are also updated starting December 1, 2025.
briefs.action_required: If you employ people on disability assistance, be aware their income support is changing in early 2026.

key_dates.label: BC disability assistance rate table updates take effect
BC disability assistance base amount increase to $1,950 takes effect
